events.text: A hardened inmate approaches you in the yard and asks whether you want protection — at a price.

choices.label: Join the group
choices.resultText: You gained protection but made enemies of rivals.

events.text: Guards announce a surprise cell search. You notice something questionable tucked under a bunk nearby.

choices.label: Stay silent
choices.resultText: The search passed without incident — this time.

choices.label: Speak up honestly
choices.resultText: The guards thanked you for cooperating.

choices.label: Hide contraband for a cellmate
choices.resultText: You were caught holding the goods.

events.text: The prison librarian offers you a quiet shift sorting books and tutoring inmates who want to read.

choices.label: Volunteer for library duty
choices.resultText: The warden noted your good behavior.

choices.label: Decline and rest
choices.resultText: You spent the afternoon on your bunk.

events.text: Tension boils over in the yard and someone shoves you during an argument over food rations.

choices.label: Fight back
choices.resultText: Both of you landed in solitary.

events.text: A family member travels a long distance to visit you through the glass partition.

choices.label: Promise to do better
choices.resultText: Their eyes welled up with hope.

choices.label: Stay guarded and quiet
choices.resultText: The visit was awkward but meaningful.
